---
title: "John Ryan, Ph.D."
page-type: about
about:
  template: trestles
  image: headshot.JPG
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 12em
---

## Education

**Georgia State University** \| Psychology, PhD\
Atlanta, GA \| 2009

**Texas A&M University** \| Statistics, MS\
College Station, TX \| 2026

**University of Arizona** \| Psychology, Philosophy, BA, BS\
Tucson, AZ \| 2001

## Experience

**UPMC**\
Department of Cardiothoracic Surgery\
Statistical Project Manager — March 2018 – presents

**University of Pittsburgh**\
Department of Psychiatry\
Assistant Professor — August 2013 – December 2017
